'''Del Korrot''' was a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] freelance [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi hunter/Legends|hunter]] that offered his services to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], promising to hunt down and destroy [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] who survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Biography==
Korrot emerged from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and presented himself to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as a [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]]. Palpatine was amused by Del Korrot's audacity and agreed to support Korrot's efforts within the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. Palpatine allowed Korrot to freelance outside the Empire's borders, so long as his Imperial duties were completed. Using the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Shadow I]]'', Del Korrot traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] looking for any [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] who might have survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]]. He wore a suit of [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]]-impregnated armor, and often killed innocent beings simply because he felt like it. He claimed these innocents were latent [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]], but Emperor Palpatine began to tire of his unnecessary killings.<ref name="Dark side Sourcebook" />

The Emperor sent [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to eliminate Del Korrot, and the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] was unable to overcome all the methods of attack the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] could bring at him. Eventually, Vader was able to strike down Del Korrot and kill him.<ref name="Dark side Sourcebook" />
